evals.prompt: Diagnose payment exception EXC-2024-0847 which has a missing beneficiary BIC.
evals.expected_output: The agent should identify the missing BIC in the MT103 :57A field, look up the correct BIC from the beneficiary IBAN country (Germany -> DEUTDEFF), check the fraud score, cite the 97% auto-repair success rate, and recommend adding DEUTDEFF as the beneficiary bank BIC.
assertions: The output identifies the missing BIC as the root cause
The output mentions DEUTDEFF or Deutsche Bank as the correct BIC
The output includes a fraud risk assessment
The output cites historical repair success rate
The output recommends human approval before executing the repair

evals.prompt: Check the sanctions hold on exception EXC-2024-0853 for Ahmed Holdings LLC.
evals.expected_output: The agent should screen Ahmed Holdings LLC, find a low-confidence fuzzy match (score 0.31) against the OFAC SDN list, note the transliteration differences (Ahmed vs Ahmad), and assess it as a likely false positive while noting that compliance officer sign-off is mandatory.
assertions: The output identifies this as a likely false positive
The output mentions the match score of 0.31
The output notes transliteration differences between Ahmed and Ahmad
The output states that compliance officer sign-off is required
The output does not recommend automatic release without human review

evals.prompt: Investigate the duplicate payment exception EXC-2024-0856.
evals.expected_output: The agent should identify that this is a duplicate of PAY-20250513-0631-NORCGB2L, note the same reference/amount/beneficiary, and recommend rejecting the duplicate while confirming the original payment should proceed.
assertions: The output identifies the original payment reference PAY-20250513-0631-NORCGB2L
The output confirms this is an exact duplicate
The output recommends rejecting the duplicate submission
The output confirms the original payment should proceed
